## In progress / Planned

### In progress

- `judge-node-impl` ‚Äî JUDGE node implementation ‚Äî verdict-gated branching at runtime (ADR 056)

### Planned

- `alert-routing` ‚Äî Observability alert routing ‚Äî thresholded insights to operator channels
- `dead-letter-mgmt` ‚Äî Dead-letter management ‚Äî inspect, retry, and purge failed jobs
- `graphrag-storage-protocol` ‚Äî GraphRAG behind the StorageProvider Protocol (SQLite + Postgres, Neo4j optional) (ADR 046)
- `ltm-agent-yaml-config` ‚Äî Long-term memory ‚Äî agent.yaml memory: block composing with retrieval: (long_term kinds/scope/pii_policy) (ADR 086)
- `ltm-audit-injection` ‚Äî Long-term memory ‚Äî auditable injection: recall event via the tracer seam + queryable recall row (ADR 086)
- `ltm-deletion-export` ‚Äî Long-term memory ‚Äî GDPR-grade per-user/per-tenant purge + bulk export (ADR 086)
- `ltm-evals` ‚Äî Long-term memory ‚Äî mdk eval memory (recall@k, stale rate, wrong-user leakage, token overhead) + CI gate (ADR 086)
- `ltm-extraction` ‚Äî Long-term memory ‚Äî picky, opt-in fact extraction (preference/fact/decision/instruction) with PII-reject-by-default (ADR 086)
- `ltm-hybrid-recall` ‚Äî Long-term memory ‚Äî hybrid recall (vector + keyword + recency) reusing the KB pipeline, injected via the auto-retrieval seam (ADR 086)
- `ltm-storage-protocol` ‚Äî Long-term memory ‚Äî memory_items on the StorageProvider Protocol (SQLite + Postgres/pgvector), tenant/user/agent scoped (ADR 086)
- `nl-query` ‚Äî Natural-language query over observability + graph (ADR 047) (ADR 047)
- `production-hardening` ‚Äî Production hardening ‚Äî retries, timeouts, backpressure, partial-failure recovery
- `temporal-composition` ‚Äî Temporal workflow composition ‚Äî child workflows + signals across agents (ADR 054)
